category_sources: Official Presenterm documentation says it creates presentations in Markdown and runs them from the terminal.
source_facts.description says Presenterm is a terminal slideshow tool.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository branding use Presenterm.
source_facts.name supplies the package name presenterm.
docs_sources: Official Presenterm documentation site provides introduction, installation, features, commands, and configuration docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official Presenterm documentation describes Markdown presentations, terminal execution, image and GIF support, theming, code highlighting, and PDF export.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal slideshow tool.
